title: Policy Reference
description: A reference to a policy in the policy registry. Used in brand compliance configurations to declare which registry policies apply.

policy_id.description: The unique identifier of the policy in the registry (e.g., "uk_hfss", "us_coppa").

version.description: Pin a specific policy version (semver). If omitted, the current version is used.

config.description: Brand-specific parameter overrides for configurable policies. The accepted shape depends on the policy's config_schema.
